name.description: Output only. The name of the Table. Format: projects/{project_id_or_number}/locations/{locationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/databases/{databaseId}/tables/{tableId}

type.description: The database type. Possible values are: `HIVE`.

hive_options.description: Options of a Hive table. Structure is [documented below](#nested_hive_options).

parameters.description: Stores user supplied Hive table parameters. An object containing a list of "key": value pairs. Example: { "name": "wrench", "mass": "1.3kg", "count": "3" }.

table_type.description: Hive table type. For example, MANAGED_TABLE, EXTERNAL_TABLE.

storage_descriptor.description: Stores physical storage information on the data. Structure is [documented below](#nested_hive_options_storage_descriptor).

database.description: The id of the parent database.

location_uri.description: Cloud Storage folder URI where the table data is stored, starting with "gs://".

input_format.description: The fully qualified Java class name of the input format.

output_format.description: The fully qualified Java class name of the output format.
